reason: A model-local Python 3.10 virtual environment built from the existing local Python 3.10 interpreter is the lowest-risk executable backend on this host. Docker and uv are unavailable, and the phase-1 target only requires repo-native import/load/infer/contract on the standalone ASR module.

Phase-1 target is minimal standalone FireRedAsr2 AED validation, not a containerized production deployment.
